tracks.rawText: 1:16synthv5CoverMinimalist lo-fi hip-hop track featuring a steady boom-bap drum pattern with a crisp snare and a muted, thumping kick drum, The harmonic foundation consists of a repetitive four-bar loop of jazzy, Rhodes-style electric piano chords with a warm, slightly saturated tone, A subtle, melodic bassline follows the root notes of the progression, providing a smooth low-end presence, The tempo is a relaxed 85 BPM in a 4/4 time signature, Production elements include a light layer of vinyl crackle and tape hiss to enhance the vintage aesthetic, The arrangement is consistent throughout, focusing on a chill, atmospheric vibe suitable for study or relaxation2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:17Alma EtermaUploadEthereal Latin pop ballad with a mid-tempo 4/4 groove at 95 BPM, The arrangement features a prominent, syncopated acoustic guitar rhythm with nylon strings, layered with atmospheric ambient pads and a clean electric guitar playing melodic fills, A deep, rounded synth bass provides the foundation, while the percussion consists of a soft electronic kick, crisp snare, and subtle shaker, The lead male vocal is smooth and breathy, utilizing significant reverb and delay for a dreamlike quality, The harmonic structure follows a sophisticated progression in a minor key, blending contemporary pop production with traditional Spanish-influenced melodic phrasing, High-frequency synth textures and vocal harmonies add depth during the chorus sections6PublishRemix
tracks.title: Alma Eterma
